examples: The noise of the machine was deafening.
One blinding flash after another came, and peal on peal of deafening thunder.
A bolt of lightning crossed the darkened sky, accompanied by a deafening thunder clap.
Sinfield converted and with England 16-14 ahead the Elland Road crowd raised their voice to almost deafening levels.
It takes the colony 20 minutes to complete the pass, while their deafening chirps engulf the night sky.
